recommendations.title: Marry My Dead Body
recommendations.overview: After finding an odd envelope, Policeman Ming-han's life takes a spooky turn: He's now wed to a ghost husband, and they must solve a crime together.

recommendations.title: Haseen Dillruba
recommendations.overview: Under investigation as a suspect in her husband's murder, a wife reveals details of their thorny marriage that seem to only further blur the truth.

recommendations.title: Millennium Mambo
recommendations.overview: Vicky recalls her romances with her exes Hao Hao and Jack in the neon-lit clubs of Taipei.

recommendations.title: The Secret of the Magic Gourd

recommendations.director: John Chu Ka-Yan, Frankie Chung Chi-Hang

recommendations.title: Shaolin

recommendations.title: Rebecca
recommendations.overview: Story of a young woman who marries a fascinating widower only to find out that she must live in the shadow of his former wife, Rebecca, who died mysteriously several years earlier. The young wife must come to grips with the terrible secret of her han

recommendations.title: Gosford Park
recommendations.overview: In 1930s England, a group of pretentious rich and famous gather together for a weekend of relaxation at a hunting resort. But when a murder occurs, each one of these interesting characters becomes a suspect.

recommendations.title: What Time Is It There?
recommendations.overview: A street vendor with a grim home-life forges a connection with a young woman on her way to Paris.
